cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.description: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties.
cookie.learnMore: Learn more about our privacy policy

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: We collect minimal data necessary to improve our services: email addresses when you subscribe to our newsletter, and anonymous usage analytics when you consent to cookies. We do not collect sensitive personal information.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use a single analytics service (PostHog) to understand how visitors use our site. This cookie is only set after you explicitly consent via our cookie banner. No cookies are set if you decline.
privacy.analyticsDesc: When you accept analytics cookies, we collect anonymous page view data, session duration, and general device information. This data helps us understand which content is most useful and improve site performance. No data is shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can withdraw cookie consent by clearing your browser's local storage. For newsletter subscribers, every email includes an unsubscribe link.
privacy.contactDesc: For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us at founder@helva.io.

terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms governing your use of our website and services.
terms.useDesc: By accessing this website, you agree to use it in good faith and in compliance with applicable laws. You may not use our services for any unlawful purpose or in a way that could damage, disable, or impair the site.
terms.ipDesc: All content on this site — including text, graphics, logos, and design — is the property of Helva Ltd. and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.
terms.liabilityDesc: Helva Ltd. provides this website and its content on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of our services.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. Material changes will be communicated via our website.

home.headline:
Language.
Knowledge.
Trust.
home.subheadline: Helva builds AI products for underserved languages, multilingual knowledge, and trusted European AI.
home.welcomeMessage: ✓ You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
home.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
home.proof1: Deqnus live — first dedicated Kurdish–English AI translator
home.proof2: Helva Chat in development — European-first conversational AI
home.proof3: Founded in Edinburgh by Abdalbast Khdhir
home.gapP1: The world's AI infrastructure is built for English. Hundreds of millions of speakers — Kurdish, smaller European languages, emerging markets — are left with tools that don't understand their words, context, or regulations.
home.gapP2: Helva exists to close that gap. Not with general-purpose models, but with purpose-built products that treat every language as a first-class citizen.
home.deqnusPitchDesc: AI-powered Kurdish–English translation built for accuracy in an underserved language pair. Sorani-first, dialect-aware, and free to use.
home.helvaChatPitchDesc: A multilingual AI assistant designed for European regulatory and cultural context. Private, compliant, and transparent by default.
home.agenticP1: We don't bolt AI onto existing products. We build from the model outward — designing interfaces, data pipelines, and evaluation loops as a single system.
home.agenticP2: Every Helva product starts with a language model fine-tuned for its domain, wrapped in an interface that makes the output useful and trustworthy.
home.whyNowP1: Open-weight models have made it possible to build high-quality language AI without Big Tech infrastructure. European regulation is creating demand for compliant, transparent AI. And underserved languages finally have enough digital text to train on.
home.whyNowP2: The window is open. Helva is walking through it.
home.founderFitTitle: Built by someone who lives the problem.
home.founderFitDesc: Abdalbast Khdhir is Kurdish, multilingual, and based in Edinburgh. He holds an MSc in data science and business analytics. He's not building translation tools as a business exercise — he's building them because his family needs them.
home.roadmapQ2: Helva Chat private beta, Deqnus Kurmanji support
home.roadmapQ3: Helva Chat public launch, API access
home.finalCtaDesc: We're looking for early users, language partners, and believers in multilingual AI.

about.label: About
about.title: Helva
about.intro: Helva builds AI products for underserved languages and trusted European AI.
about.challengeTitle: Language AI has a coverage problem.
about.challengeP1: The world's AI infrastructure is optimised for English. Hundreds of millions of speakers — Kurdish, smaller European languages, emerging markets — are left behind. Translation tools fail. Assistants don't understand. Enterprise AI can't be adopted without compliance risk.
about.challengeP2: This isn't a niche problem. It affects trade, education, healthcare, and civil society across entire regions.
about.challengeHighlight: Helva exists to close that gap.
about.completenessDesc: In Swedish it echoes hel — the feeling of something finished, balanced, and complete.
about.warmthDesc: In Sorani Kurdish it nods to halva — something made with care and shared in meaningful moments.
about.shareabilityDesc: In English, it stays clean and open — a word we get to define through what we make.
about.buildP1: We build purpose-built AI products — each one designed for a specific language problem, with its own model, interface, and evaluation loop.
about.buildP2: Deqnus solves Kurdish translation. Helva Chat solves multilingual enterprise AI. Each product stands alone, but they share infrastructure, values, and a commitment to underserved languages.
about.detailsDesc: Every product starts with the language problem, not the technology. Models are fine-tuned for specific language pairs and domains.
about.clarityDesc: No black boxes. Users see how translations are generated, where answers come from, and what the model doesn't know.
about.longevityDesc: Privacy by design, GDPR compliance, and data residency. AI that respects the regulatory and cultural context it operates in.
about.quote: Helva builds AI that treats every language as a first-class citizen.
about.quoteFollow: Not as an afterthought. Not as a feature flag. As the entire point.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: How Helva's AI products and engineering capabilities can work for your organisation.
solutions.forStartupsDesc: Integrate AI translation and multilingual processing into your existing systems. From document translation to real-time communication.
solutions.forEnterprisesDesc: Deploy conversational AI and language tools that meet European regulatory requirements. GDPR-compliant, transparent, and auditable.
solutions.forAgenciesDesc: Run structured pilots of Helva products within your organisation or institution. We provide the models, you provide the domain expertise.
solutions.discoveryDesc: We understand your language and compliance requirements, then define the integration surface.
solutions.architectureDesc: We design the technical integration — API contracts, data flows, model selection, and evaluation criteria.
solutions.executionDesc: We deploy, monitor, and iterate. You get a working system, not a proof of concept.
solutions.evolutionDesc: We refine model performance based on real usage data. The system gets better over time.
solutions.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss how Helva's AI products can work within your organisation.

ai.label: AI
ai.title: AI
ai.subtitle: Helva builds AI products grounded in specific language problems. Every model is fine-tuned for its domain, evaluated against real-world benchmarks, and deployed with transparency.
ai.intelligentAutomationDesc: Language models trained on curated parallel corpora for specific language pairs. Dialect-aware, context-sensitive, and continuously evaluated.
ai.personalizationEnginesDesc: Conversational AI that works across languages natively — not through a translation layer. Built for European linguistic and regulatory context.
ai.naturalLanguageDesc: Every AI response traces back to its sources. Users see what the model knows, what it inferred, and where uncertainty exists.
ai.predictiveAnalyticsDesc: Automated and human-in-the-loop evaluation pipelines. Models are benchmarked against native-speaker quality, not generic BLEU scores.
ai.philosophyP1: We don't add AI to check a box. We build AI products where the model is the product — not a feature bolted onto something else.
ai.philosophyP2: Every Helva product starts with a language problem. The model, the interface, and the evaluation loop are designed together as a single system.
ai.humanCenteredDesc: We start with the language problem, not the technology. Models are selected and fine-tuned for specific language pairs and domains.
ai.transparentDesc: No black boxes. Users see how outputs are generated, where answers come from, and what the model doesn't know.
ai.ethicalDesc: Privacy by design, GDPR compliance, and data residency. AI that respects the regulatory and cultural context it operates in.
ai.integratingDesc: AI capabilities are live in Deqnus and in active development for Helva Chat.

thesis.label: Thesis
thesis.title: Thesis
thesis.subtitle: Why Helva exists, what we believe, and where we're going.
thesis.coreBeliefP1: The world's AI infrastructure is built for English. Hundreds of millions of speakers — Kurdish, smaller European languages, emerging markets — are left with tools that don't understand their words, context, or regulations.
thesis.coreBeliefP2: This is not a feature request. It's a structural failure in how AI is built and deployed. Helva exists to fix it.
thesis.approachP1: We don't build one model and hope it works for every language. We build dedicated products — each with its own fine-tuned model, curated training data, and evaluation pipeline.
thesis.approachP2: Deqnus is a translation tool, not a chatbot that also translates. Helva Chat is a multilingual assistant, not an English assistant with a translation layer.
thesis.marketP1: Open-weight models have made it possible to build high-quality language AI without Big Tech infrastructure. European regulation (GDPR, AI Act) is creating demand for compliant, transparent AI. And underserved languages finally have enough digital text to train on.
thesis.marketP2: The companies that build trusted, language-specific AI products now will own these markets for a decade.
thesis.founderTitle: Built by someone who lives the problem.
thesis.founderP1: Abdalbast Khdhir is Kurdish, multilingual, and based in Edinburgh. He holds an MSc with distinction in data science and business analytics.
thesis.founderP2: He's not building translation tools as a business exercise — he's building them because his family needs them. That's founder-market fit you can't manufacture.
thesis.visionP1: In five years, Helva will be the default AI layer for organisations that need trustworthy, multilingual AI in Europe and beyond.
thesis.visionP2: We start with Kurdish and European languages. We expand language by language, product by product, always purpose-built, always transparent.

deqnus.title: Deqnus
deqnus.description: AI-powered Kurdish–English translation built for accuracy in an underserved language pair. Real-time bidirectional translation with dialect awareness.
deqnus.problem: Kurdish is one of the most underserved languages in machine translation. Existing tools produce unreliable output, miss dialectal nuance, and fail on idiomatic expressions. Millions of Kurdish speakers have no trustworthy digital translation tool.
deqnus.solution: Deqnus uses fine-tuned language models trained on curated Kurdish–English parallel corpora. It supports Sorani script, handles idiomatic phrases, and provides contextual alternatives. The interface is minimal — paste text, get a translation, copy the result.
deqnus.outcome: Deqnus is live and serving users at deqnus.vercel.app. It is the first dedicated Kurdish–English AI translation tool built with dialect-level accuracy in mind.

helva-chat.title: Helva Chat
helva-chat.description: A multilingual AI assistant designed for European regulatory and cultural context. Private, compliant, and transparent by default.
helva-chat.problem: Most AI assistants are built for English-first, US-centric contexts. European users face poor multilingual support, opaque data handling, and models that don't understand local regulation, culture, or language nuance. Enterprises can't adopt them without compliance risk.
helva-chat.solution: Helva Chat is a conversational AI layer built for European users and organisations. It supports multiple languages natively, respects GDPR by design, and provides transparent reasoning. It is built to be embedded into workflows — not used as a novelty.
helva-chat.outcome: Helva Chat is in active development. Early architecture focuses on multilingual reasoning, source attribution, and a plugin system for domain-specific knowledge.
